oldValue:
Changes the way handheld lights are rendered in the Photonics mod.

Off - Handheld lights are not rendered at all via Photonics
Single - Only one of the handheld lights will cast shadows
Separate - Both handheld lights will cast separate shadows

§aMinimal performance impact
newValue:
改變手持光源如何在 Photonics 模組中被渲染.

關 - 手持光源完全不經 Photonics
被渲染單個陰影 - 只有一個手持光源會投射陰影
獨立陰影 - 雙手各自手持的光源都會獨立投射陰影

§a性能影響較小
